_about: Copy for the scorecard. Tiers are high->low. The tier NAMES ({LANG}_name) + ui labels are the fixed, deterministic identity (don't run-to-run vary them). The {LANG}_roast lines are the SAFE DEFAULT/FALLBACK + a tone EXEMPLAR: at runtime the model rewrites axes[].roast (the full line shown on the share card itself — there is no separate breakdown section) in the user's language, idiomatic and aggregate-grounded; it may wrap ONE key phrase in **…** which the renderer turns into a gold highlight. GROUNDING RULE: every roast must describe a phenomenon backed by a concrete number in the merged JSON — describing the phenomenon is enough; a light wry note is optional, NOT a savage punchline tacked onto every axis. NEVER assert an activity ccoach does not measure (e.g. whether tests were executed, whether code was reviewed, whether plan mode 'should' have been used) — it tracks tool/command CATEGORIES and counts, not intent; inventing such a claim (e.g. 'never ran a test') is a correctness bug, not a joke. Roasts tease changeable HABITS, never the person/ability, and never quote prompt text. The 'title'/personality summary is model-written. To add a tier-name locale: add {LANG}_name (and optionally {LANG}_roast) to every tier and a ui.{LANG} block; scorecard.mjs reads them generically and falls back to the default language.

zh.local_privacy_note: 全部 logs 解析在你本地完成

en.local_privacy_note: All log parsing happens on your machine.

tiers.zh_roast: 结构清晰、带约束、点名文件——需求一次说清，几乎不返工
tiers.en_roast: Structured, constrained, file-anchored — the ask lands in one pass.

tiers.zh_roast: 方向准，偶尔补一句收尾
tiers.en_roast: On target — just the occasional follow-up to tidy up.

tiers.zh_roast: 能说清楚，准头和篇幅还能再收一点
tiers.en_roast: Clear enough — aim and length could tighten up.

tiers.zh_roast: 结构和约束偏少，常常边问边改
tiers.en_roast: Light on structure and constraints — lots of fixing as you go.

tiers.zh_roast: prompt 又短又松散，细节多靠 AI 推断
tiers.en_roast: Short, loosely-structured prompts — much is left for the AI to infer.
A steady bill — spent where it counts.

tiers.zh_roast: 这段时间成本偏高，缓存重放占了大头
tiers.en_roast: A high-spend stretch — much of it cache replay.

tiers.zh_roast: 高价模型占了大头，单次任务却不大
tiers.en_roast: The priciest model carries most of the load, even on small tasks.

tiers.zh_roast: 改动集中，编辑与探索比例均衡
tiers.en_roast: Focused work — a balanced mix of editing and exploring.

tiers.zh_roast: 以动手编辑为主，节奏稳
tiers.en_roast: Mostly hands-on edits, at a steady pace.

tiers.zh_roast: 命令和搜索远多于实际文件改动
tiers.en_roast: Far more shell and search than actual file edits.

tiers.zh_roast: 一个 session 横跨好几个仓库
tiers.en_roast: A single session spread across several repos.

tiers.zh_roast: 活跃天数很多，几乎天天在线
tiers.en_roast: Active on most days across the window.

tiers.zh_roast: 深夜时段的活跃占比不低
tiers.en_roast: A sizable share of activity lands late at night.

tiers.zh_roast: 作息规律，深夜很少上线

tiers.en_roast: Activity clustered into just a few days.
